title: Solstice Economy
description: An economy module for Solstice Essentials
body:
# Solstice Economy
Solstice Economy is a server-side economy module for Solstice Essentials that provides a simple Economy system using /pay
## Commands
- `/pay <player> <amount>` - Pays some currency to another player. Ex: `/pay HerrKatzeGaming 19.99`
- `/balance [player]` - Gets your balance or another player's balance
- `/eco <add|set|subtract> <player> <amount>` - Admin command to affect the economy
- `/eco license [register|revoke]` - Registers or revokes your CC API license. Not passing register or revoke will send you your CC API key

## Notes
- The economy is cents-based. Commands will automatically convert dollars to cents.
- There is no built in way to do shops. An addon is required for this functionality.
